description: Beginning of a deed from Abū l-Faraj Yeshuʿa ha-Levi to the dyer Abū l-ʿAlāʾ b. Abū Saʿd. Dated: Wednesdsay, 1 Adar 1539 Seleucid = 9 February 1228 CE. (Information from Goitein's index card.) On verso there is a list in Arabic script beginning with "pepper." VMR
description_he: ראשית שטר מאבו אל-פרג' ישועה הלוי לצבעי אבו אל-אעלא, 9 בפברואר 1228.
